'''竏噐-zh-v-h''' ('''kayazhvehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:foal|foal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-zh-v-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foal|foal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏噐-zh-v-h
|-
! Lemma
| kayazhvehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyazhvehoko|thiyazhvehoko]] || [[word:jiyazhvehoko|jiyazhvehoko]] || [[word:shiyazhvehoko|shiyazhvehoko]] || [[word:kiyazhvehoko|kiyazhvehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyazhvehoko|thuthuyazhvehoko]] || [[word:jujuyazhvehoko|jujuyazhvehoko]] || [[word:shushuyazhvehoko|shushuyazhvehoko]] || [[word:kukuyazhvehoko|kukuyazhvehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyazhvehoko|thuyazhvehoko]] || [[word:juyazhvehoko|juyazhvehoko]] || [[word:shuyazhvehoko|shuyazhvehoko]] || [[word:kuyazhvehoko|kuyazhvehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyazhvehoko|thuyazhvehoko]] || [[word:juyazhvehoko|juyazhvehoko]] || [[word:shuyazhvehoko|shuyazhvehoko]] || [[word:kuyazhvehoko|kuyazhvehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyazhvehoko|theyazhvehoko]] || [[word:jeyazhvehoko|jeyazhvehoko]] || [[word:sheyazhvehoko|sheyazhvehoko]] || [[word:keyazhvehoko|keyazhvehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyazhvehoko|thothoyazhvehoko]] || [[word:jojoyazhvehoko|jojoyazhvehoko]] || [[word:shoshoyazhvehoko|shoshoyazhvehoko]] || [[word:kokoyazhvehoko|kokoyazhvehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyazhvehoko|thoyazhvehoko]] || [[word:joyazhvehoko|joyazhvehoko]] || [[word:shoyazhvehoko|shoyazhvehoko]] || [[word:koyazhvehoko|koyazhvehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyazhvehoko|thoyazhvehoko]] || [[word:joyazhvehoko|joyazhvehoko]] || [[word:shoyazhvehoko|shoyazhvehoko]] || [[word:koyazhvehoko|koyazhvehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦyazhvehoko|thﾃｦyazhvehoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦyazhvehoko|jﾃｦyazhvehoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦyazhvehoko|shﾃｦyazhvehoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦyazhvehoko|kﾃｦyazhvehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayazhvehoko|thathayazhvehoko]] || [[word:jajayazhvehoko|jajayazhvehoko]] || [[word:shashayazhvehoko|shashayazhvehoko]] || [[word:kakayazhvehoko|kakayazhvehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayazhvehoko|thayazhvehoko]] || [[word:jayazhvehoko|jayazhvehoko]] || [[word:shayazhvehoko|shayazhvehoko]] || [[word:kayazhvehoko|kayazhvehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayazhvehoko|thayazhvehoko]] || [[word:jayazhvehoko|jayazhvehoko]] || [[word:shayazhvehoko|shayazhvehoko]] || [[word:kayazhvehoko|kayazhvehoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
